title: Chalet in Rockaway Beach · ★5.0 · 2 bedrooms · 2 beds · 1 bath
description: This dog-friendly chalet in Rockaway Beach is the perfect place for your next vacation on the Oregon Coast. You’ll enjoy peace and quiet with chirp...

amenity_groups.title: Bedroom and laundry
items: Essentials - Towels, bed sheets, soap, and toilet paper

amenity_groups.title: Family
items: Pack ’n play/Travel crib - always at the listing
Children’s books and toys for ages 0-2 years old, 2-5 years old, and 5-10 years old
Baby bath - always at the listing

amenity_groups.title: Home safety
items: Exterior security cameras on property - Security: For your safety and the security of the house when it is unoccupied, there is one security camera which monitors the driveway area. Camera is not monitored when guests are present. There are no interior cameras.

amenity_groups.title: Kitchen and dining
items: Kitchen - Space where guests can cook their own meals
Cooking basics - Pots and pans, oil, salt and pepper
Dishes and silverware - Bowls, chopsticks, plates, cups, etc.
Coffee maker: drip coffee maker, french press, Keurig coffee machine

amenity_groups.title: Location features
items: Shared beach access - Guests can enjoy a nearby beach
Private entrance - Separate street or building entrance

amenity_groups.title: Outdoor
items: Backyard - Not fully fenced - An open space on the property usually covered in grass
Beach essentials - Beach towels, umbrella, beach blanket, snorkeling gear

amenity_groups.title: Services
items: Pets allowed - Assistance animals are always allowed
Luggage dropoff allowed - For guests' convenience when they have early arrival or late departure
Long term stays allowed - Allow stay for 28 days or more

message: Listing summary detected from the public Airbnb page.
